name: rampart
description: Open-source firewall for AI agents. Policy engine that audits and controls what OpenClaw, Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and any AI tool can do on your machine.
summaryZh: Open-source firewall for AI agents. Policy engine that audits and controls what OpenClaw, Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and any AI tool can do on your machine. 这是一类偏执行和编排的 AI 项目，适合拿来搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近活跃度很高，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
